title: Man of Straw
writer: Pietro Germi, Alfredo Giannetti, Leonardo Benvenuti
actors: Pietro Germi, Luisa Della Noce, Franca Bettoia
plot: Andrea Zaccardi has returned home from hunting. He and his wife Luisa are very close. Their young son Giulio develops a cough. The doctor recommends the seaside. Luisa leaves with Giulio for several weeks. Andrea stays to work at ...
